descriptionHtml:
Fountaine Pajot Astrea 42 for Sale 2019 | 4 Guest Cabins + 2 Crew Cabins | Tax Paid

If you are seeking a well-maintained catamaran for comfortable cruising or charter, consider this Fountaine Pajot Astrea 42 for sale 2019. The vessel is in good condition and is currently visible in Sicily. Built in 2019, she features spacious interiors, up-to-date electronics, and a generous accommodation layout suitable for families or groups. She is registered under the Italian flag, has been used by one owner, and comes with a valid safety certificate until December 2027.

Main Specifications

  • Brand: Fountaine Pajot Astrea 42
  • Year: 2019
  • Located: Sicily
  • Registration: Italian, Pleasure Yacht
  • Owner: One
  • Safety Certificate Expiry: 03/12/2027
  • Maximum Persons: 22 / 18 / 12 (depending on registration)

Dimensions

  • Overall Length: 12.58 m
  • Beam: 7.20 m
  • Draft: 1.25 m
  • Displacement: 12,700 kg

Hull & Deck

  • Hull Colour: White
  • Hull Material: VTR (fibreglass)
  • Keel Material: VTR
  • Cockpit Table: Yes (solid wood)
  • Cushions: Sunbrella outdoor fabric
  • Deck Shower: Yes

Interior Layout

  • Double Cabins: 4
  • Crew Cabins: 2 forward
  • Convertible Dinette: Sofa converts to bed
  • Total Bathrooms: 4
  • Showers: 4
  • Electric Toilets: 4
  • Interior Wood: Oak
  • Galley:
    • Stove—3 burners
    • Refrigerators—3

Engine and Propulsion

  • Engines: 2 Volvo Penta
  • Power: 50hp each
  • Year: 2019
  • Operating Hours: 1200 (as of November 2025)
  • Type: Inboard
  • Steering: Wheel
  • Fuel Tank: 470 litres

Sails & Rigging

  • Lazy Bag: Yes
  • Furling Mainsail: Yes

Mooring & Safety

  • Tender: Yes (2025)
  • Outboard: Yes, 10hp (2025)
  • Anchor Windlass: Yes
  • Anchor & Chain: Yes
  • Mooring Lines: Yes
  • Life Raft: Yes (expires 03/2025)
  • Fenders: 6+2

Electronic Systems

  • Autopilot: Yes
  • VHF: Yes
  • Echosounder: Yes
  • Log: Yes
  • Compass: Yes
  • Wind Instruments: Yes
  • Stereo: Yes
  • Plotter: Yes

Electrical & Comfort

  • Voltage: 12V
  • Batteries: 4
  • Battery Capacity: 800 + 200 amp
  • Water Tanks: 2 (total 700 litres, plastic)
  • Battery Charger: Yes
  • Heating: Yes
  • Air Conditioning: Yes
  • Boiler: Yes
  • Autoclave: Yes
  • Black Water System: Yes

Summary

The Fountaine Pajot Astrea 42 for sale 2019 is in good condition, well-equipped, and ready for further adventures. The catamaran is ideal for both private owners and charter operators. If you would like more information or to schedule a viewing in Sicily, please contact us.
